testcase.name: test_5_wrong_then_6th_returns_429
test_second_call_within_60s_does_not_create_new_token

failure.message: AssertionError: RATE-LIMIT NOT ENFORCED: second forgot-password within 60s created another token (count 1→2). Spec requires 1/60s. assert 2 == 1

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: RATE-LIMIT NOT ENFORCED: second forgot-password within 60s created another token (count 1→2). Spec requires 1/60s. assert 2 == 1

testcase.name: test_disable_requires_correct_password

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='msg-hub-59.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/auth/2fa/enable (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='msg-hub-59.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xff6ab22db9d0>, 'Connection to msg-hub-59.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=10)'))

testcase.failure:
E TimeoutError: timed out
